**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Nanjing Tianzhilin Electronic Technology Co., Ltd. exhibits an extreme discrepancy between its appearance and reality. Although the enterprise name carries the prominent suffix 'Joint Stock Limited Company' and has recently added 'intelligent unmanned aerial vehicle manufacturing' to its business scope, the forensic engine reveals a cruel reality: the number of insured employees in 2024 is 0, and out of the 5 million registered capital, only 110,000 RMB was actually paid in. Its registered address is located in the old city of Nanjing (No. 420 Zhonghua Road, Qinhuai District), completely lacking the physical conditions to set up a drone manufacturing assembly line or an electronic device processing plant. In fact, this is a typical 'zero-person' shell integrator or bidding front. It makes a living primarily by reselling office equipment and finished drones like DJI, as well as undertaking subcontracting or agency invoicing businesses for weak-current engineering (surveillance, integrated cabling) and information system integration projects.
